appliedUpdates.description: Documented the current invalid-model Task failure (`custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`) and the docs-only runtime probe degradation (8081 health probe exit 7, 5433 connection refused) so future validators know to fall back to in-session docs validation when the contract is documentation-only.

environmentConstraints: Delegated Task/subagent launches failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; flow validation was completed directly in-session.

Passive runtime probes were unavailable during this round (`curl -sf http://localhost:8081/actuator/health` exit 7; 127.0.0.1:5433 refused), but the assertion set was fully testable via docs/code-review/**.
